evals.prompt: Set up Tailwind CSS 4 in my Vite + React project
evals.expected_output: Agent installs @tailwindcss/vite, adds it to vite.config.ts plugins, creates CSS entry with @import "tailwindcss", and imports CSS in main.tsx
expectations: Shows vite.config.ts with tailwindcss() in plugins array
Does not create a tailwind.config.js file

evals.prompt: How do I configure content sources in Tailwind CSS 4? I have components in a shared package.
evals.expected_output: Agent explains @source directive as replacement for content array, shows how to add external package sources
expectations: Uses @source directive, not content array in config
Shows @source with glob pattern for shared package
Explains that @source replaces the content array from TW3

evals.prompt: I need to set up Tailwind in a project that uses Webpack, not Vite
evals.expected_output: Agent recommends @tailwindcss/postcss for non-Vite projects, shows postcss.config.mjs setup
expectations: Shows postcss.config.mjs with correct plugin config
